name: auth
summary: Handles JWT-based login/register/logout/refresh against users-auth service. Stores access_token and refresh_token in localStorage. ProtectedRoute in App.tsx gates all non-auth routes.
key_notes: Token key is 'auth_token' in localStorage — canvas-api and workspace-api both read this same key.
getToken() is used synchronously by ProtectedRoute — no async guard.
Google OAuth URL is built client-side as a redirect, no PKCE flow implemented.
